game_config.description: Token-free game config used for certification and default local episode runs.
game_config.title: Game Config

players.description: Ordered bundled-player slots for the certification episode.
players.title: Players

player_id.description: ID of a bundled player runnable to use for this certification slot.
player_id.title: Player Id

readme.description: Required top-level README.md document for game rules, strategy, player guidance, and FAQs.
readme.title: Readme

pages.description: Optional public documentation pages. Use game-authored pages for supplemental material; Softmax leagues may also list a platform-owned play_*.md guide for setup, upload, and submission.
pages.title: Pages

version.description: Coworld package version. Pydantic validation requires a valid PEP 440 version.
version.title: Version

description.description: Human-readable game description surfaced by product UIs.
description.title: Description

config_schema.description: JSON Schema for runtime game configs. It must require a fixed-length string-array `tokens` field; variants and certification configs omit tokens because the runner injects them.
config_schema.title: Config Schema

results_schema.description: JSON Schema for the game-written results artifact. Cross-game consumers require `scores`.
results_schema.title: Results Schema

runnable.description: Game container runnable. Its `type` must be `game`.

protocols.description: Protocol documentation for game-owned WebSocket surfaces.

docs.description: Game-authored documentation surfaced through Coworld tools and UIs.

CoworldManifest.description: Schema for a complete game world in the Softmax universe.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI for IDE tooling.
$schema.title: $Schema

game.description: Game runnable and protocol metadata. Role docs: docs/roles/GAME.md.
game.markdownDescription: See the [Game role](docs/roles/GAME.md) documentation for this role's contract.

player.description: Bundled player runnables. Role docs: docs/roles/PLAYER.md.
player.markdownDescription: See the [Player role](docs/roles/PLAYER.md) documentation for this role's contract.
player.title: Player

reporter.description: Reporter runnables. Optional; include entries when the Coworld ships reporter services. Each entry declares a purpose and output_format. Role docs: docs/roles/REPORTER.md.
reporter.markdownDescription: See the [Reporter role](docs/roles/REPORTER.md) documentation for this role's contract.
reporter.title: Reporter

commissioner.description: Commissioner runnables. Optional. Role docs: docs/roles/COMMISSIONER.md.
commissioner.markdownDescription: See the [Commissioner role](docs/roles/COMMISSIONER.md) documentation for this role's contract.
commissioner.title: Commissioner

grader.description: Grader runnables. Optional; include entries when the Coworld ships grader containers. Role docs: docs/roles/GRADER.md.
grader.markdownDescription: See the [Grader role](docs/roles/GRADER.md) documentation for this role's contract.
grader.title: Grader

diagnoser.$comment: Optional in the current schema; intended to become required as this role stabilizes.
diagnoser.description: Diagnoser runnables. Optional today, but expected to become required once the diagnoser contract stabilizes. Role docs: docs/roles/DIAGNOSER.md.
diagnoser.markdownDescription: See the [Diagnoser role](docs/roles/DIAGNOSER.md) documentation for this role's contract.
diagnoser.title: Diagnoser

optimizer.$comment: Optional in the current schema; intended to become required as this role stabilizes.
optimizer.description: Optimizer runnables. Optional today, but expected to become required once the optimizer contract stabilizes. Role docs: docs/roles/OPTIMIZER.md.
optimizer.markdownDescription: See the [Optimizer role](docs/roles/OPTIMIZER.md) documentation for this role's contract.
optimizer.title: Optimizer

certification.description: Smoke-test episode used by coworld certify and default local episode runs.

CoworldManifest.title: Coworld Manifest

type.description: Manifest role section this runnable belongs to.
type.title: Type

image.description: Docker image reference to run for this role.
image.title: Image

run.description: Optional process command overriding the image entrypoint or default command.
run.title: Run

env.description: Public environment variables passed to the runnable. Do not put secrets here.
env.title: Env

source_url.description: Optional public source repository, directory, or file URL for this runnable.
source_url.title: Source Url

id.description: Stable runnable identifier within this manifest. Certification fixtures reference player ids.
id.title: Id

name.description: Human-readable runnable name for CLIs and UIs.
name.title: Name

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this runnable does.

repository_url.description: Optional Git repository the local optimizer tooling clones and runs. Used by `coworld optimize` to resolve a game-specific optimizer workbench; informational for other roles.
repository_url.title: Repository Url

CoworldReporterSpec.description:
A reporter runnable: a persisted, WS-woken service plus its declared purpose and output format.

Reporters extend the shared role spec with the two things the manifest must declare for every reporter:
what kind of signal it produces (``purpose``) and the shape of the payload it writes back over the
WebSocket (``output_format``). See ``docs/roles/REPORTER.md`` for the runtime contract.

type.description: Manifest role section this runnable belongs to.
type.title: Type

image.description: Docker image reference to run for this role.
image.title: Image

run.description: Optional process command overriding the image entrypoint or default command.
run.title: Run

env.description: Public environment variables passed to the runnable. Do not put secrets here.
env.title: Env

source_url.description: Optional public source repository, directory, or file URL for this runnable.
source_url.title: Source Url

id.description: Stable runnable identifier within this manifest. Certification fixtures reference player ids.
id.title: Id

name.description: Human-readable runnable name for CLIs and UIs.
name.title: Name

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this runnable does.
description.title: Description

repository_url.description: Optional Git repository the local optimizer tooling clones and runs. Used by `coworld optimize` to resolve a game-specific optimizer workbench; informational for other roles.
repository_url.title: Repository Url

purpose.description: What kind of signal this reporter produces: narrative (human-readable summaries), timeseries (tick-aligned numeric series), or categorical_events (discrete labelled events). The set is expected to grow.
purpose.title: Purpose

output_format.description: Output format this reporter emits. A bare MIME string (e.g. "text/markdown") for human-terminal outputs, or a typed {mime, schema} descriptor for outputs consumed by downstream machines. The string form is the clean upgrade lane to a named-format registry later.
output_format.title: Output Format

CoworldReporterSpec.title: CoworldReporterSpec

type.description: Role contract implemented by this runnable.
type.title: Type

image.description: Docker image reference to run for this role.
image.title: Image

run.description: Optional process command overriding the image entrypoint or default command.
run.title: Run

env.description: Public environment variables passed to the runnable. Do not put secrets here.
env.title: Env

source_url.description: Optional public source repository, directory, or file URL for this runnable.
source_url.title: Source Url

type.description: Document reference kind for inline text.
type.title: Type

CoworldTypedOutputFormat.description:
Machine-consumed reporter output: a MIME type plus the JSON Schema its payload validates against.

The schema is what lets a downstream consumer (diagnoser, optimizer, Observatory surface) parse a
reporter's output without out-of-band knowledge. Human-terminal reporters declare a bare MIME string
instead; see ``ReporterOutputFormat``.

mime.description: MIME type of the reporter output payload, e.g. application/json.
mime.title: Mime

schema.description: JSON Schema the output payload validates against, for machine consumers of this reporter.
schema.title: Schema

CoworldTypedOutputFormat.title: CoworldTypedOutputFormat

type.description: Document reference kind for a public HTTP(S) document.
type.title: Type

value.description: Public HTTP(S) URL for the document.
value.title: Value

id.description: Stable variant identifier used by CLIs and league configuration.
id.title: Id

game_config.description: Token-free game config that validates against game.config_schema.
game_config.title: Game Config
